latin: Uxor ad mensam mariti accessit et centenas paginas inspexit. in omnibus eadem verba scripta erant: 'labor sine ludo stultum hominem facit.' terrore percussa est.

questions.target: Hundreds of pages with the same sentence repeated
choices: Hundreds of pages with the same sentence repeated

questions.prompt: What was written on every page?
questions.target: All work and no play makes a dull man
choices: All work and no play makes a dull man
I will never leave this hotel

translation: The wife approached her husband's desk and examined hundreds of pages. On all of them the same words were written: 'All work and no play makes a man dull.' She was struck with terror.
